An incident's magnitude is estimated and validated

Criteria: Ex1: Review other potential targets of the incident to search for indicators of compromise and evidence of persistence | Ex2: Automatically run tools on targets to look for indicators of compromise and evidence of persistence
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: Actions performed during an investigation are recorded, and the records' integrity and provenance are preserved
requirements.description:
Actions performed during an investigation are recorded, and the records' integrity and provenance are preserved

Criteria: Ex1: Require each incident responder and others (e.g., system administrators, cybersecurity engineers) who perform incident response tasks to record their actions and make the record immutable | Ex2: Require the incident lead to document the incident in detail and be responsible for preserving the integrity of the documentation and the sources of all information being reported
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

subcategories.name: Incident Management
subcategories.description: Incidents are categorized and prioritized

requirements.name: Incidents are categorized and prioritized
requirements.description:
Incidents are categorized and prioritized

Criteria: Ex1: Further review and categorize incidents based on the type of incident (e.g., data breach, ransomware, DDoS, account compromise) | Ex2: Prioritize incidents based on their scope, likely impact, and time-critical nature | Ex3: Select incident response strategies for active incidents by balancing the need to quickly recover from an incident with the need to observe the attacker or conduct a more thorough investigation
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: Incidents are escalated or elevated as needed
requirements.description:
Incidents are escalated or elevated as needed

Criteria: Ex1: Track and validate the status of all ongoing incidents | Ex2: Coordinate incident escalation or elevation with designated internal and external stakeholders
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: Incident reports are triaged and validated
requirements.description:
Incident reports are triaged and validated

Criteria: Ex1: Preliminarily review incident reports to confirm that they are cybersecurity-related and necessitate incident response activities | Ex2: Apply criteria to estimate the severity of an incident
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: The criteria for initiating incident recovery are applied
requirements.description:
The criteria for initiating incident recovery are applied

Criteria: Ex1: Apply incident recovery criteria to known and assumed characteristics of the incident to determine whether incident recovery processes should be initiated | Ex2: Take the possible operational disruption of incident recovery activities into account
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared
requirements.description:
The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared

Criteria: Ex1: Detection technologies automatically report confirmed incidents | Ex2: Request incident response assistance from the organization’s incident response outsourcer | Ex3: Designate an incident lead for each incident | Ex4: Initiate execution of additional cybersecurity plans as needed to support incident response (for example, business continuity and disaster recovery)
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

subcategories.name: Incident Mitigation
subcategories.description: Incidents are contained

requirements.name: Incidents are contained
requirements.description:
Incidents are contained

Criteria: Ex1: Cybersecurity technologies (e.g., antivirus software) and cybersecurity features of other technologies (e.g., operating systems, network infrastructure devices) automatically perform containment actions | Ex2: Allow incident responders to manually select and perform containment actions | Ex3: Allow a third party (e.g., internet service provider, managed security service provider) to perform containment actions on behalf of the organization | Ex4: Automatically transfer compromised endpoints to a remediation virtual local area network (VLAN)
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: Incidents are eradicated
requirements.description:
Incidents are eradicated

Criteria: Ex1: Cybersecurity technologies and cybersecurity features of other technologies (e.g., operating systems, network infrastructure devices) automatically perform eradication actions | Ex2: Allow incident responders to manually select and perform eradication actions | Ex3: Allow a third party (e.g., managed security service provider) to perform eradication actions on behalf of the organization
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

subcategories.name: Incident Response Reporting and Communication
subcategories.description: Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders

requirements.name: Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders
requirements.description:
Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders

Criteria: Ex1: Securely share information consistent with response plans and information sharing agreements | Ex2: Voluntarily share information about an attacker’s observed TTPs, with all sensitive data removed, with an Information Sharing and Analysis Center (ISAC) | Ex3: Notify HR when malicious insider activity occurs | Ex4: Regularly update senior leadership on the status of major incidents | Ex5: Follow the rules and protocols defined in contracts for incident information sharing between the organization and its suppliers | Ex6: Coordinate crisis communication methods between the organization and its critical suppliers
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.

requirements.name: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
requirements.description:
Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents

Criteria: Ex1: Follow the organization’s breach notification procedures after discovering a data breach incident, including notifying affected customers | Ex2: Notify business partners and customers of incidents in accordance with contractual requirements | Ex3: Notify law enforcement agencies and regulatory bodies of incidents based on criteria in the incident response plan and management approval
requirements.verification: Review requirement evidence and assessment responses.
